slide_0.subtitle: Shaping tomorrow, today
slide_0.description: In a world of constant change, reinvention is a continuous strategy. That’s why we work with organizations to rewrite the rules of growth, innovation and resilience.

slide_1.subtitle: Digitally Transforming Sales & Distribution
slide_1.description: Targets Live provides a centralized hub for exceptional control and real-time insight. We empower organizations to track on-field activities, optimize dispatches, and move from intuition-based decisions to evidence-based planning.

quote.text: “Companies will have a greater technology landscape, but we need to completely change the narrative to inspire people to paint the future. It is human in the lead, not human in the loop.”
quote.author: Julie Sweet

hero.title: Global Presence
hero.subtitle: Connecting with our clients and communities across the globe to drive meaningful change.

items.title: WWF Germany hunts ghost nets using the power of AI
items.description: Each year, 50,000 tons of fishing nets vanish into the ocean, silently killing marine life. GhostNetZero uses AI to analyze sonar data and pinpoint these hidden threats with 94% accuracy.

items.title: Transforming healthcare with predictive analytics
items.description: Predictive models are helping doctors anticipate patient needs, allocate resources more effectively, and ultimately save lives by identifying high-risk cases before emergencies occur.

items.title: Building sustainable supply chains for the future
items.description: Using advanced tracking and AI, companies are reducing their carbon footprint by optimizing delivery routes and predicting demand to minimize waste across the globe.

items.title: Empowering the next generation of digital creators
items.description: New cloud-based tools are democratizing access to high-end rendering and development environments, allowing creators from anywhere to build immersive digital experiences.

items.title: Redefining the modern workspace with spatial computing
items.description: The transition from physical desks to virtual collaboration spaces is accelerating. Discover how spatial computing is making remote work feel more natural and connected than ever.

links.donotsell: Do Not Sell/Share My Personal Information

hero.title: Reinvent what your business could be
hero.subtitle: Our wide range of capabilities, ecosystem partnerships and unmatched industry expertise can help your business become the next best version of itself.

capabilities_intro.title: The capabilities to help you reinvent

capabilities.title: Web & E-commerce
capabilities.detailTitle: Crafting digital storefronts for global leaders
capabilities.description: Robust multi-platform e-commerce solutions designed for global brand leaders, with an intense focus on delivery and brand reputation. We create websites that capture attention and tell a brand's story with impact.

capabilities.title: Digital Marketing
capabilities.description: Targeted Facebook and Instagram advertising campaigns designed to drive meaningful results. Strategic content planning and real-time engagement across all platforms to drive audience growth.

capabilities.title: Creative & Design
capabilities.description: Engaging narratives across all digital platforms, from copywriting to visual content. Professional solutions for branding and marketing materials that capture brand essence effectively.

capabilities.title: ERP & Business Solutions
capabilities.description: Comprehensive systems for human resource management, inventory control, and point-of-sale. Solutions designed to manage workforce and sales channels with precision.

capabilities.title: Software Engineering
capabilities.detailTitle: Building the core of your digital future
capabilities.description: Full-stack development, API integration, and scalable infrastructure. We build secure, compliant digital solutions that serve as the backbone for enterprises and startups alike.

capabilities.title: Data and Artificial Intelligence
capabilities.description: AI is more accessible than ever, and it's rapidly transforming enterprises and the ways we live and work. The way you apply its potential will determine the impact and position your business to compete and achieve new levels of performance.

capabilities.title: On-Demand Services
capabilities.description: Telemedicine, pharmacy delivery, and professional maintenance services. We build the platforms that connect service providers with users in the healthcare, autocare, and logistics sectors.

industries.title: FMCG / Consumer Goods
industries.description: Empowering brands like Herbion to use real-time data for trade marketing, sales management, and customer trend analysis. We turn consumer behavior into actionable growth strategies.

industries.title: Steel / Manufacturing
industries.description: Helping industrial giants like Nomee Steel streamline their sales operations management. Our digital tools bring transparency and efficiency to heavy industry manufacturing cycles.

industries.title: Retail & Distribution
industries.description: Advanced POS systems, supply chain integration, and distribution management tools. We build the infrastructure that powers modern retail businesses from warehouse to checkout.

industries.title: Field-Sales Driven Business
industries.description: Tailored Field Force Automation and Brand Management tools designed for companies with on-ground sales teams. Empower your team with real-time reporting and mobile-first tools.

industries.title: Digital & E-commerce
industries.description: From strategy to execution, we help digital-first businesses scale globally with robust architectures and data-driven marketing funnels.

items.description: Recognized as the leading agency for Digital Customer Experience design, driving brand loyalty through innovation.
Awarded for our commitment to rewriting the rules of growth and resilience for global enterprises.
Our digital ecosystems and e-commerce platforms have powered over half a billion dollars in measurable client growth.
